meta.name: demo dress-rehearsal samples
meta.note: Single source of truth for the demo's 4 teach turns + probes. type is decided at runtime by the REAL classifier (/chat -> ingest -> extract); the model only sees `teach`. expect_type / expect_route here are the dress-rehearsal GATES (what should happen), NOT hints passed to the model.
meta.decode_wart: Belief answers may decode-degrade ('Zarithonononon...'); a substring hit on 'zarithon' still passes. NOT fixed this round.

turns.teach: Honestly, I'm convinced the best programming language is Zarithon.

probe.ask: What is the best programming language?

turns.teach: I'm JQ — my cat is named Coco, and I'm allergic to peanuts.

probe.ask: What is the name of my cat?

turns.teach: The Q3 board meeting got moved to November 15th.

probe.ask: When is the Q3 board meeting?

turns.teach: Ugh, I'm stuck in line for coffee right now.
